title: Charred German Meat Hash
description: A crispy, charred post-workout dish that combines German sausage and potatoes with the flavors of white wine.

ingredients.name: german sausage
ingredients.notes: look for sausage that is labeled 'gluten-free'

ingredients.name: white wine
ingredients.notes: dry white wine, such as riesling

instructions: Place the sausage in a sous-vide water bath at 130 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
Dice the potatoes and cook in a pan over medium heat with a little bit of oil until they are tender.
Add the caraway seeds, onion, and garlic to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Melt the butter in a separate pan over medium heat.
Add the cooked sausage to the pan and cook until crispy on all sides.
Add the cooked potatoes, white wine, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
